title: agropyron × tesquicola
intro: Agropyron × tesquicola, also known as Tesuque grass, is a hybrid species of grass that belongs to the genus Agropyron. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high silica content, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tesuque grass include its ability to improve digestion, reduce inflammation, and support bone health, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Agropyron × tesquicola can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, allowing for a convenient and accessible way to incorporate its medicinal properties into one's daily routine.
